name: Tye Soon Limited
summary: Tye Soon Limited, together with its subsidiaries, imports and exports, and distributes automotive parts in Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, Thailand, South Korea, and internationally. It offers electrical and aircon parts, transmission products, chassis and body parts, engine parts, and brake parts, as well as genuine parts. The company is also involved in the trading of automotive spare parts. The company was founded in 1933 and is based in Singapore. Tye Soon Limited is a subsidiary of OBG & Sons Pte Ltd.
